figures.caption: Table 1: Macro F-score (%) for different attention mechanisms on MSP-Podcast. Dev results use MSP-Podcast v1.0 [5], while T1 (Test1) and T2 (Test2) use MSP-Podcast v2.0 [4]. Mean averages across SSL backbones.

Figure 2: Inference time and peak GPU memory usage of the seq2seq module as a function of sequence length on the MSPPodcast dev set [5]. Panels (a–b) report results for all models. Panels (c–d) provide a zoomed view excluding SA to make the relative growth trends of the remaining alternatives easier to distinguish.
